questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Headache
questions.question_text: What assessment tools would you use for a patient with headache?
expected_points: Assess headache using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to headache
Implement evidence-based interventions for headache
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in neurology setting
